_comment: Maps every */dev.yaml and */prod.yaml in this repo to the BirService chart schema so new tenant files get IDE validation automatically — no per-file $schema comment needed. The relative path assumes BasePlate is checked out as a sibling folder (workspace layout: <root>/BasePlate, <root>/BasePlate-Dev). If you clone only this repo, switch to the URL form once the schema is published to main: replace the key with https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Murad-Suleymanov/BasePlate/main/charts/birservice/values.schema.json
